notes: Initial seed per PR 5 of 2026-05-26 freeze plan. Quarantined datasets are downloaded but pending anomaly review (project_state 2026-05-26). Event-like daily endpoints are pending review even though namespacing is enforced (anomaly review separate).

Coverage-gated (all >=50% non-null; ebitda/fin_exp_int_exp/rd_exp EXCLUDED for sparse coverage) + independent-recompute provider parity (15351 cells, 0 mismatch via workspace/scripts/verify_statement_provider_parity.py). Wave-2 (GPT Round-6 sequencing). 3 fina_indicator_vip margin-ladder ratios; same ann_date family as existing approved indicators; coverage 98-99.9%; loader-parity verified (lag-0+lag-1). holder_num + forecast p_change DEFERRED (separate families, need own PIT-disclosure review). Unlocks qual_margin_{op_of_gr,ebit_of_gr,profit_to_gr}.

EventDrivenBacktester now sources limit-up/down from Tushare stk_limit $up_limit/$down_limit (primary) via Exchange.resolve_limit_prices, with a computed round-half-up band fallback for verified holes (BSE 2021 launch, IPO no-limit days, legacy names). Coverage verified 2008-2026 (2024+ zero holes); values verified on regulatory tiers (>=99.79% on +/-5/10/20/30%, worst window 2021=99.7957%; residual = no-limit sentinel rows [registration-system IPO no-limit days, up_limit~1e6/down_limit~0.01], the pre-2023 main-board IPO first-day +44%/-36% rule, and penny-stock fen-rounding -- all correct). Execution field knowable at session open; no Ref lag required. No on-disk/pipeline change.

Capital-flow review (diag_moneyflow_review.py): full coverage from 2014 (2008 partial 31.5%), clean value sanity (0 negative components, balanced turnover Sbuy~Ssell corr 0.99998), provider parity 0 mismatches. net_mf_amount/net_mf_vol APPROVED but flagged OPAQUE VENDOR NETS (do not reconcile from components; best corr ~0.51/0.55 to main-force net) -> prefer component-derived signals. PIT: same-day daily outcome -> Ref(...,1) required. Option A (approve all 18 with caveat). No on-disk/pipeline change.

PARTIAL promotion: 5 clean balance/buy fields approved (coverage 99.8-100% from 2010, 0 negatives). 2 repayment fields ($rzche/$rqchl) HELD at quarantine (margin_detail_repayment entry) — 28,127/799 negative rows in 2024, all .BJ (BSE) names (vendor quirk).
